name: Lady Devimon

signature_move.name: Darkness Wave
signature_move.description: Unleashes creatures of darkness similar to bats which incinerate the opponent.

description: A Fallen Angel Digimon with noble presence who takes a feminine form. It owes its great power to the incomparable strength and purity of its Dark Side Power, and it is said that the number of instances where this Digimon has been raised at length on a personal computer is close to none. Its Special Move is " Darkness Wave ", where it releases countless flying creatures of darkness similar to bats which incinerate the opponent. Another Special Move, " Poison ", converts the opponent's power into dark energy, obliterating them from within. The more powerful the opponent is, the more complete the technique becomes.
